EffectDirectory.InvalidCompendiumId: Side Effects | Effect Compendium '{compendium}' is an invalid compendium ID. Please correct the Effect Compendium setting.
EffectDirectory.InvalidCompendium: Side Effects | Effect Compendium '{compendium}' is invalid or does not exist. Please correct the compendium or Effect Compendium setting.

CreateCompendium.Prompt: Effect Compendium '{compendiumId}' does not exist. Effect Interface will not load. Do you want to automatically create a new compendium named '{compendiumName}' and reload?
CreateCompendium.Title: Side Effects | Create Effect Compendium

AddStatusEffects.Name: Add Status Effects
AddStatusEffects.Hint: Add all Status Effects to the Effect Compendium, once.

DisableSpecialEffects.Name: Disable Special Effects
DisableSpecialEffects.Hint: When enabled, blinded and invisible conditions will not apply visual effects.

EffectCompendium.Name: Effect Compendium ID
EffectCompendium.Hint: The Compendium ID of the compendium that is linked to the Effect Interface. To copy a Compendium ID, open the compendium and click the book in the top right. Paste the ID here. Default is 'world.side-effects'.

EffectInterfacePlacement.Name: Effect Interface Placement
EffectInterfacePlacement.Hint: Sidebar tab which the Effect Interface is placed after.

EffectInterfaceEnabled.Name: Enable Effect Interface
EffectInterfaceEnabled.Hint: Enables the Effect Interface, a document directory in the sidebar which is linked to a compendium. Allows custom status effects and managment of effects.

ExportForSharing.Name: Export for Sharing Option
ExportForSharing.Hint: Adds an option to the item and actor directory context menus to export without descriptions.

HiddenCompendiums.Name: Hidden Compendiums
HiddenCompendiums.Label: Configure Hidden Compendiums
HiddenCompendiums.Hint: Selected compendiums will not be rendered in the compendium directory.

RemoveStatusEffectsFromHud.Name: Remove Status Effects from Token HUD
RemoveStatusEffectsFromHud.Hint: Prevents selected status effects from appearing on the token HUD.

ReplaceStatusEffectIcons.Name: Replace Status Effect Icons
ReplaceStatusEffectIcons.Hint: Replaces some default status effect icons. This will still respect changes from the effect interface.

TemporaryEffectHud.Name: Temporary Effects Token HUD
TemporaryEffectHud.Hint: Adds temporary effects to the status effect token HUD.

UiChatMessage.Name: Chat Message Dark Mode
UiChatMessage.Hint: Enables a dark mode for chat messages.

UiSidebar.Name: Custom Sidebar
UiSidebar.Hint: Visual tweaks to the sidebar including chat background, scrollbar flipping, and other minor changes.
